We label the grid as  
\[
\begin{array}{ccc}
a & b & c \\
d & e & f
\end{array}
\]  
The row sums give \(100a+10b+c + 100d+10e+f = 999\) and the column sums give \((10a+d)+(10b+e)+(10c+f)=99\).

From the column sum:  
\(10(a+b+c)+(d+e+f)=99\).  
From the row sum:  
\(100(a+d)+10(b+e)+(c+f)=999\).

Let \(S_1 = a+b+c\), \(S_2 = d+e+f\).  
Then \(10S_1+S_2=99\) and \(100a+10b+c+100d+10e+f=999\).
